tldr_zh: 美伊達成戰爭協議，Anthropic遭美政府禁令，SpaceX創紀錄IPO，多國禁未成年人使用社群媒體
tldr_en: US-Iran war deal reached, Anthropic faces government restrictions, SpaceX IPO breaks records, multiple countries ban social media for minors

items.title_zh: 美政府禁止外國用戶存取Anthropic最強AI模型
items.title_en: US government bans foreign access to Anthropic's most powerful AI models
items.summary_zh: 特朗普政府要求Anthropic立即封鎖所有外國用戶（包括公司員工）對Fable 5和Mythos 5的存取，導致Anthropic暫停提供這兩款最新模型。此舉引發網安專家抗議，認為限制會削弱全球網路安全防護能力，也凸顯美國政府對AI產業的直接干預。
items.summary_en: The Trump administration ordered Anthropic to block all foreign nationals from accessing its latest Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models, forcing the company to shut them down immediately. The move sparked protests from cybersecurity experts who argue it undermines global security defenses and demonstrates direct government interference in the AI industry.

items.title_zh: Fox以220億美元收購Roku，拓展智慧電視廣告生態
items.title_en: Fox acquires Roku for $22 billion to expand smart TV ecosystem
items.summary_zh: Fox Corp.同意以220億美元收購串流中介平台Roku，接管其在逾1億家庭的電視業務、作業系統及FAST服務。這筆交易將加強Fox對智慧電視市場的掌控與廣告投放能力，改變數位電視生態格局。
items.summary_en: Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku for $22 billion, taking over the streaming platform's operations across 100+ million homes worldwide, including its OS and FAST services. The deal strengthens Fox's control over smart TV markets and advertising capabilities, reshaping the digital TV ecosystem.

items.title_zh: SpaceX創紀錄IPO融資857億美元，成全球最大太空公司
items.title_en: SpaceX raises record $85.7 billion in historic IPO
items.summary_zh: SpaceX首次公開發行股票融資857億美元，創科技界IPO融資記錄，承銷商全數行使超額認購權。這筆融資將支持SpaceX星鏈擴張、星艦開發等雄心勃勃計畫，鞏固其全球太空產業領導地位。
items.summary_en: SpaceX's IPO raised a record $85.7 billion, with underwriters maxing out overallotment rights. The historic fundraise supports SpaceX's Starlink expansion, Starship development, and solidifies its dominance in the global space industry.

items.title_zh: Meta推出AI搜尋模式，利用公開貼文訓練生成結果
items.title_en: Meta launches 'AI Mode' search powered by public Facebook posts
items.summary_zh: Meta在Facebook推出新的"AI Mode"搜尋選項，利用用戶的公開貼文訓練AI生成搜尋結果。這是Meta追趕AI競賽、提升用戶黏著度的最新努力，展現大型科技公司如何將用戶數據轉化為AI優勢。
items.summary_en: Meta introduced 'AI Mode' search on Facebook, using public posts to generate AI-powered results. This reflects Meta's efforts to catch up in the AI race and boost user engagement by leveraging user-generated data.

items.title_zh: 英國計畫禁止16歲以下青少年使用社群媒體
items.title_en: UK unveils sweeping social media ban for users under 16
items.summary_zh: 英國政府宣布擬禁止16歲以下青少年使用Snapchat、TikTok、YouTube等主流社群媒體，可能實施夜間封禁機制。澳洲去年率先實施類似禁令，多國跟進，旨在保護青少年心理健康，但批評者擔憂此舉可能推升暗網使用風險。
items.summary_en: The UK plans to ban social media platforms including Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook, and X for under-16s, possibly with overnight curfews. Following Australia's lead, multiple countries are adopting similar measures to protect youth mental health, though critics warn of unintended consequences.

items.title_zh: Google Chrome關閉廣告攔截器漏洞，uBlock Origin面臨失效
items.title_en: Google Chrome closes loopholes allowing older ad blockers to work
items.summary_zh: Google Chrome 150和151版本（預計6月底和7月上線）將完全封閉舊版廣告攔截擴充工具（如uBlock Origin）的運作漏洞。Google自2024年起逐步淘汰Manifest V2，此舉完成其控制廣告生態的布局。
items.summary_en: Google Chrome versions 150 and 151 will close remaining workarounds for legacy ad blockers like uBlock Origin. This completes Google's transition from Manifest V2, solidifying its control over the browser ad ecosystem.

items.title_zh: Xbox遊戲工作室Ninja Theory面臨關閉，員工尋求收購
items.title_en: Xbox shuts down Ninja Theory, studio behind acclaimed Hellblade series
items.summary_zh: 微軟Xbox宣布關閉開發《地獄刀》的著名工作室Ninja Theory，員工希望尋得買家接手。此舉為Xbox近期裁員潮的一部分，反映遊戲產業整併加劇與製作成本攀升的趨勢。
items.summary_en: Xbox announced the closure of Ninja Theory, the studio behind the acclaimed Hellblade franchise, though staff hope to find a buyer. The move reflects ongoing consolidation in the gaming industry amid rising development costs.

items.title_zh: NVIDIA尋求融資250億美元，測試AI產業融資胃納
items.title_en: Nvidia seeks over $25 billion in bond sale, testing AI sector appetite
items.summary_zh: 晶片製造巨頭NVIDIA計畫首次債券融資超過250億美元，這是其2021年以來最大融資舉動。此舉將測試投資人對AI產業進一步融資的態度，以及AI熱潮的持續力。
items.summary_en: Chipmaker Nvidia plans to raise over $25 billion in its first major bond sale since 2021. The move tests investor appetite for continued exposure to the AI sector amid sustained market enthusiasm.

items.title_zh: 美伊達成協議終止中東戰爭，荷莫茲海峽擬19日重開
items.title_en: US and Iran reach deal to end Middle East war, Hormuz Strait to reopen
items.summary_zh: 美國總統特朗普宣佈美伊已簽署電子版和平備忘錄，結束近期中東戰爭。荷莫茲海峽將從19日起恢復通航，但各界對協議具體內容仍有困惑，油價恢復正常流動可能需要數週至數月。
items.summary_en: President Trump announced the US and Iran signed an electronic peace memorandum ending the Middle East conflict. The Strait of Hormuz will reopen from June 19, though details remain unclear and oil normalization could take weeks to months.

items.title_zh: 以總理尼坦雅胡：以軍必要時將持續駐守加薩與敘利亞
items.title_en: Netanyahu vows Israeli forces will remain in Gaza, Lebanon, Syria as needed
items.summary_zh: 以色列總理尼坦雅胡表示，儘管美伊戰爭協議達成，以色列軍隊將「只要有必要」就持續駐守加薩、黎巴嫩和敘利亞，暗示以色列不打算立即撤軍，可能引發地區緊張升級。
items.summary_en: Israeli PM Netanyahu stated Israeli forces will remain in Gaza, Lebanon, and Syria "as long as necessary" despite the US-Iran deal, signaling no immediate withdrawal and potential regional escalation.

items.title_zh: 美軍B-52轟炸機加州墜毀，原因待調查
items.title_en: US Air Force B-52 Stratofortress crashes at Edwards Air Force Base
items.summary_zh: 一架B-52同溫層堡壘轟炸機在加州愛德華空軍基地起飛後墜毀，造成嚴重焦黑痕跡。軍方啟動調查程序，此事件為美軍近期的重大安全事件。
items.summary_en: A B-52 Stratofortress crashed at Edwards Air Force Base in California shortly after takeoff, leaving large burn marks. The Air Force has launched an investigation into the incident.

items.title_zh: 中國火箭碎片瀕危星鏈，產生百餘新太空垃圾
items.title_en: Chinese rocket breaks apart near Starlink constellation, creating new space debris
items.summary_zh: 中國火箭在近地軌道解體，於星鏈衛星群附近產生約100至150件新的太空碎片。此事件凸顯太空垃圾對衛星安全的日益嚴重威脅，引發國際關注。
items.summary_en: A Chinese rocket broke apart in orbit near the Starlink constellation, generating approximately 100 to 150 new pieces of space debris. The incident highlights growing concerns about orbital debris threatening satellite operations.
